title: epipactis helleborine f. minor
intro: Epipactis helleborine f. minor, also known as the autumn lady's tresses, is a rare and unique orchid species that is native to Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Epipactis helleborine f. minor include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Epipactis helleborine f. minor can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are made by infusing the plant's roots and leaves in a solvent like water or alcohol.
